---
title: "GGplot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
height_data <- read_csv("height_data_clean.csv") %>%
  mutate(survey_date = as.Date(survey_date))
```

```{r}
ggplot(height_data, aes(x = survey_date, y = height_cm, color = pop)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = pop)) +
  labs(
    title = "Height Over Time by Population",
    x = "Survey Date",
    y = "Height (cm)",
    color = "Population"
  )
```

```{r}
jan27_data <- height_data %>%
  filter(survey_date == as.Date("2023-01-27"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(jan27_data, aes(x = pop, y = height_cm)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Height by Population on January 27, 2023",
    x = "Population",
    y = "Height (cm)"
  )
```
